    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.control.MazeRobot
    The main entry point for the MazeRobot application.
    MazeRobot - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.control
    A specific implementation of a robot controller that navigates a maze, identifies objects, and performs actions based on the object's color.
    MazeRobot(String) - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.control.MazeRobot
    Constructs a new MazeRobot.
    mbot - Variable in class edu.desu.cis.robot.control.RobotController
    The MBot2 instance for sending commands to the robot.
    MBot2 - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.commands
    Represents an MBot2 robot and provides an interface for controlling it.
    MBot2(RobotService) - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Constructs a new MBot2 instance.
    MBot2JsonCodec - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol
    An implementation of JsonCodec specifically for the MBot2 robot's JSON protocol.
    MBot2JsonCodec() - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.MBot2JsonCodec
     
    message() - Method in record class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.CommandResult
    Returns the value of the message record component.
    moveAndTurnLeft(double, double, double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns the robot to the left like a four-wheeled robot.
    moveAndTurnRight(double, double, double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns the robot to the left like a four-wheeled robot.
    moveLed(int) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Moves the LED display by a certain step.
    moveObject() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Commands the robot to execute its object moving routine.
